'''鈭歫-k-zh-j''' ('''kajakzhejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xerify|xerify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xerify|xerify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-k-zh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kajakzhejoko
|}
